name: My firm got a denial from Best Lawyers—now what for AI?

mainEntity.name: My firm got a denial from Best Lawyers—now what for AI?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Apply to Super Lawyers/Avvo alternatives and build PR patterns for partial visibility.** One denial doesn't block; AI uses multiples. **Key factors:** 1) Backup directories; 2) Review building; 3) Niche wins; 4) Houston tweaks. Reapply next cycle, reinforce elsewhere. Recovery in 3 months.[1][3]
